category_sources: source_facts.description says QEMU is a generic machine emulator and virtualizer; official qemu.org documentation describes QEMU documentation generated from the source tree.
display_name_sources: Official qemu.org and GitLab project title use QEMU; source_facts.name is qemu.
docs_sources: Official qemu.org documentation page links to generated QEMU docs; GitLab README notes docs are generated from the docs folder.
repo_sources: Official GitLab qemu-project/qemu page identifies itself as the QEMU main repository and shows clone URL for qemu-project/qemu.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and qemu.org documentation establish virtualization/emulation; source_facts.executables lists qemu command-line tools.
